channel.title: Threadwit Studio — Printable Planners
channel.description: New printable planners and trackers from Threadwit Studio. Instant download PDF, A4 + US Letter.

item.title: Daily Planner Printable
item.description: A clean, undated daily planner that actually gets used. Plan your day on one page: hourly schedule (6:00–21:00), top 3 priorities, to-dos, notes, and a tiny water & mood tracker. Includes a second simpler to-do layout for lighter days. Instant download printable, A4 + US Letter.
